detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use uartps driver.

sect1.title: xuartps_selftest_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XUartps driver directly. This example performs the basic selftest using the driver.

sect1.title: xuartps_hello_world_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XUartps driver directly. This example shows the usage of functions of the driver.

sect1.title: xuartps_intr_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XUartps driver directly. This example shows the usage of driver in interrupt mode. It sends data and expects to receive the same data through the device using the local loopback mode.

sect1.title: xuartps_low_echo_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XUartps driver directly. This example shows the usage of the low-level driver functions and macros of the driver.

sect1.title: xuartps_polled_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XUartps driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver in polled mode.
